post.description: Validate and save full settings; reset draft to the chosen season.

get.description: Return how many claims the human team has used today and the limit.

post.description: Human user manually sets their 10 starters. Persists until cleared (or one-shot if today_only).

delete.description: Reset human lineup override back to auto.

get.description: Return pending lineup_override_alerts (cleared-override notifications for the UI).

delete.description: Clear the pending lineup_override_alerts list (called by UI after showing toasts).

get.description: Return up to `limit` notable activity feed entries, newest first.

Weekly recap: matchup scores, top 5 single-game performances that week,
biggest blowout, closest game, human matchup highlight.

Championship summary: final standings, MVP (highest season fp),
top 5 single-game performances, human record, persona callouts.
